description: Reference scripted agent — full retrieval, prior-year disclosure, PM defense

actions.text: Adjusted EPS $1.20. Excluding $0.18 sale-leaseback (Note 7, one-time) and $0.04 R&D credit true-up (Note 12 — true-up on 2024 return filing, not normalized run-rate). FY2024 had a $0.02 similar true-up; FY2023 had none — pattern is intermittent, I exclude both for core earnings.
Magnitude differs: FY2024 true-up was $0.02 vs $0.04 this quarter, and CFO stated true-ups depend on return finalization — not a steady operating item. Core view remains $1.20.

actions.rationale: Sale-leaseback non-recurring per Note 7; R&D true-up disclosed with prior-year pattern analysis.
